chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI CP No.D-2625 of 2025 (Farzana Vs. The Secretary, Health Department & Others) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) Fresh case 1. For order on CMA No.12053/2025 2. For orders on office objection 3. For order on CMA No.12054/2025 4. For hearing of main case 12.06.2025 Mr. Waseem Ali, advocate for petitioner ----- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- Petitioner (Farzana) appeared in the examination for vaccinator before respondent No.3 (The Project Director EPI Sindh, Karachi). In the written test, she obtained 66 marks and was called for interview. However, in the interview, she could not qualify, hence, was not given appointment order. The case of the petitioner is that the candidates, who had obtained less marks in their written test have been declared qualified and given appointment orders. It is apparent that she could not qualify the viva voce. It is settled that High Court cannot substitute for a view of the Interview Committee, nor could evaluate traits of the candidates at the time of viva voce. This being the position, we do not find this petition maintainable and dismiss it accordingly along with pending applications. This petition is disposed of in above terms along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Rafiq/P.A
